CVE-2022-44617.title: A flaw was found in libXpm. When processing a file with width of  ...
CVE-2022-44617.summary: A flaw was found in libXpm. When processing a file with width of 0 and a very large height, some parser functions will be called repeatedly and can lead to an infinite loop, resulting in a Denial of Service in the application linked to the library.

CVE-2022-46285.title: A flaw was found in libXpm. This issue occurs when parsing a file ...
CVE-2022-46285.summary: A flaw was found in libXpm. This issue occurs when parsing a file with a comment not closed; the end-of-file condition will not be detected, leading to an infinite loop and resulting in a Denial of Service in the application linked to the library.

CVE-2022-4883.title: A flaw was found in libXpm. When processing files with .Z or .gz  ...
CVE-2022-4883.summary: A flaw was found in libXpm. When processing files with .Z or .gz extensions, the library calls external programs to compress and uncompress files, relying on the PATH environment variable to find these programs, which could allow a malicious user to execute other programs by manipulating the PATH environment variable.

CVE-2023-43786.title: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to an infinite loop withi ...
CVE-2023-43786.summary: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to an infinite loop within the PutSubImage() function. This flaw allows a local user to consume all available system resources and cause a denial of service condition.

CVE-2023-43787.title: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to an integer overflow wi ...
CVE-2023-43787.summary: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to an integer overflow within the XCreateImage() function. This flaw allows a local user to trigger an integer overflow and execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges.

CVE-2023-43788.title: A vulnerability was found in libXpm due to a boundary condition w ...
CVE-2023-43788.summary: A vulnerability was found in libXpm due to a boundary condition within the XpmCreateXpmImageFromBuffer() function. This flaw allows a local attacker to trigger an out-of-bounds read error and read the contents of memory on the system.

CVE-2023-43789.title: A vulnerability was found in libXpm where a vulnerability exists  ...
CVE-2023-43789.summary: A vulnerability was found in libXpm where a vulnerability exists due to a boundary condition, a local user can trigger an out-of-bounds read error and read contents of memory on the system.
